info.text: Progress can be awkward at first until you learn the dance steps.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress is achievable when you have a partner to dance with.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: The movement toward equality is inexorable.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The movement toward equality often takes one step forward and one step backwards.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress requires coordinated footwork to avoid tripping over yourself.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The civil rights group rhythmically marched forward in unison for progress.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: There's no status in the modern world without the ability to dance.
